_note: Committed golden replay values for the canonical USS fixture (signal.uss.json + ohlcv.json). uwrScore/uwrAxes/direction/riskBucket/conviction are produced VERBATIM by the afi-core scorer scoreFroggyTrendPullbackFromEnriched with defaultUwrConfig UNCHANGED (four equal 0.25 weights => uwrScore == mean(axes)); established by m2-scoring-pipehead-afi-core. inputHash/bundleHash/outputHash are canonical sha256 digests (recursive key-sorted, runtime timestamps stripped) over the rawUss, the normalized AnalysisBundle, and the deterministic scoring projection respectively; established by m2-audit-pipehead-hashing.
